title: Notice on the  Extension of the Exemption Exam for Late-Registered Students
content:
Notice on the  Extension of the Exemption Exam for Late-Registered Students

Dear Students,

The University would like to inform all students that the Exemption Exam will be extended to

late-registered students only.

The exam will be available on the

Advanced Learning Management System (ALMS)

on

Wednesday, 22nd October 2025

, and

Thursday, 23rd October 2025

, between

9:00 a.m.

and

5:00 p.m

.

The exam will consist of 60 multiple-choice questions, and each student will have 50 minutes to complete the test. Please note that only one attempt will be allowed for each student, no retakes will be possible.

This extension is provided exclusively for late-registered students who were unable to participate in the original exam session.

Students who have already taken the Exemption Exam previously will not be permitted to retake it.

This will be the final opportunity for students to take the Exemption Exam. No further extensions or additional exam sessions will be offered.

Foreign Languages Department
